caption: A man with a tall, grey, stylized wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with a small red bow tie and tan suspenders. To his left is a black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and various items of clothing, including a yellow shirt with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen text includes a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appearing in multiple locations. The man remains seated and maintains a similar profile view throughout the sequence, slightly shifting his gaze and facial expression. His posture is consistent across the frames, and the camera remains stationary, capturing the same medium shot of the subject against the cluttered, eclectic studio backdrop.
